heading: Exclusion of 1949 acreage in computation of future allotments
label: 1344a Exclusion of 1949 acreage in computation of future allotments
text: Notwithstanding the provisions of title III of the Agricultural Adjustment Act of 1938, as amended [ et seq.], or of any other law, State, county, and farm acreage allotments and yields for cotton for any year after 1949 shall be computed without regard to yields or to the acreage planted to cotton in 1949.7 U.S.C. 1301
notes: References in TextThe Agricultural Adjustment Act of 1938, referred to in text, is , . Title III of the Act is classified generally to subchapter II (§ 1301 et seq.) of this chapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see and Tables.act Feb. 16, 1938, ch. 3052 Stat. 31section 1281 of this title
CodificationSection was not enacted as part of the Agriculture Adjustment Act of 1938 which comprises this chapter.
